description: The License schema lists many fields as required, but live responses from api.axiom.co omit several of them (e.g. defaultRegion, withAuths, regions). Make all the observed-to-be-missing fields optional so getOrg / getOrgs / updateOrg / createOrg succeed at decode time. `id` and `tier` are kept required because every observed response includes them and they're genuinely useful to depend on.
